revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[二・二六事件]]に関連する人物・思想・政治思想などのカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:ににろくしけん}} [[Category:昭和時代戦前...'

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages

Merge [[Category:昭和時代戦前の東京]] into [[Category:Prewar Shōwa Tokyo]] via bot
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Merge [[Category:日本の公安]] into [[Category:Public security in Japan]] via bot
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"

Merge [[Category:Nōhon Shugi (Agrarian Principlism)]] into [[Category:Japanese Peasant Movement]] via bot
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat|26 February Incident}} {{Catmore}} * 事件に関する人物・思想・政治思想などを収める。
{{DEFAULTSORT:ににろくしけん}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{Commonscat|26 February Incident}} {{Catmore}} {{citation needed|ににろくしけん}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:二・二六事件]]}} {{translated page|ja|Category:二・二六事件|version=101644517}} [[Category:Assassinations in Japan]] [[Category:Attempted coups in Japan]] [[Category:Battles in 1936]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:February 1936]] [[Category:History of Chiyoda, Tokyo]] [[Category:Imperial Japanese Army]] [[Category:Incidents and Accidents of Police Officers Killed in the Line of Duty]] [[Category:Japanese Incidents of 1936]] [[Category:Japanese Peasant Movement]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Nagatachō, Tokyo]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Prewar Shōwa Tokyo]] [[Category:Public security in Japan]] [[Category:Right-Wing Incidents in Japan]] [[Category:Shōwa Restoration]] [[Category:Terrorist incidents in Japan]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with commons links]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:wikimedia commons named categories]] [[commons:Category:26 February Incident]] [[ja:Category:二・二六事件]] [[ko:Category:2·26 사건]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:People_associated_with_the_February_26_Incident]] [[zh:Category:二二六事件]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"

Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
